_doc: GG tournament structure reference for cEV/stack starting-stack resolution. Used by gem_cev.py. Two sections: 'ladders' maps a series fingerprint to its L1 starting stack (for tier-2 extrapolation when Hero late-registered and L1 was never observed); 'name_overrides' is a hand-corrected name -> starting_chips table (tier-3 fallback). Conflict handling: if the same tournament name legitimately has different starting stacks across dates, replace the scalar with a list of {date_from, starting_chips} entries and gem_cev will flag any ambiguous lookup as unresolved rather than guessing.

ladders._doc: Keyed by the L1 (small/big) blind string. Value: standard starting stack for any GG series that opens on that blind level. When the earliest observed hand is L2+, gem_cev matches the observed level's blinds against a known ladder progression to identify L1 and read the start. These are GG's standard regular-speed structures. NOTE: blind level alone does not uniquely fix the starting stack (a 50/100 Deepstack starts deeper than a 50/100 regular) — the 'snap standards' below list every known GG starting stack so an L1-observed read snaps to the nearest real value.

50/100.note: Standard regular-speed MTT / Takedown / Turbo open level

100/200.note: Bounty Bonanza / Big Bounties standard open level

100/200_deep.note: Deepstack 100/200 open (v8.6.3 R1 — needs name disambiguation)

snap_standards._doc: Every known GG starting-stack value. gem_cev snaps an l1_observed chip read to the nearest of these if within 5%. Covers Deepstack (20000) which shares the 50/100 open level with regular 10000 structures.

ladder_progressions._doc: Observed GG blind progressions, used to identify the L1 of a structure from a later level. Each list is (level, sb, bb) in order. gem_cev matches an observed (level, sb, bb) against these to back-solve L1.

name_overrides._doc: Hand-corrected name -> starting_chips. Use only when tiers 1-2 cannot resolve. Tournament name alone is NOT a safe key across dates; if a name needs different values on different dates, replace the integer with a list of {"date_from": "YYYY-MM-DD", "starting_chips": N} and gem_cev flags ambiguous matches as unresolved. Entries below are marked 'unverified' until Ron confirms — gem_cev treats unverified overrides as low-confidence.

165-M 55 Bounty Hunters Daily Main [Deep.note: Deepstack format; standard GG bounty start assumed 25000 — Ron to confirm

GGMasters Bounty.note: v8.6.3 R1: GGMasters Bounty family opens 25/50 but starts 10000 (not satellite 5000)
